autumn in the most beautiful scenic place in #china ✨🍂🍁🏞️🍃✨ #jiuzhaigou #九寨沟 

📍Jiuzhaigou, a world #UNESCO heritage site, is renowned for its scenic and aesthetic majesty. Its fairyland landscape of numerous lakes, waterfalls, limestone terraces, with their attractive, clear, mineral-rich waters, set in the spectacular alpine mountains stretching over 72,000 ha in the northern part of #Sichuan Province, China
